title: Fable 5 is never coming back, here's why
summary: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and characterizes this as the beginning of a permanent technological underclass. The video does not detail the specific reasons for the ban or technical content.
writeup: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and frames the move as the start of a permanent technological underclass. The video connects the ban to broader questions of model regulation and who retains access to advanced systems. It does not detail the specific reasons for the ban or its technical content, so the central claim is the prediction that Fable 5 will not return.
